context: Tests whether the agent uses the correct image-with-text layout field values (image_first or text_first — not 'left', 'right', or other variants) and the correct rich-text button block field naming (button_label / button_link without _1 suffix). Also verifies alternating layout direction for the education-focused archetype.

checklist.name: image-with-text sections present
checklist.description: templates/page.how-it-works.json contains at least two sections of type 'image-with-text'

checklist.name: layout values valid: image_first or text_first only
checklist.description: All 'layout' settings on image-with-text sections use only 'image_first' or 'text_first' — no occurrences of 'left', 'right', 'image-first', 'text-first', 'image_left', 'text_left', or any other variant

checklist.name: Alternating layout directions
checklist.description: The image-with-text sections alternate between 'image_first' and 'text_first' layout (not all the same direction)

checklist.name: rich-text CTA section present
checklist.description: templates/page.how-it-works.json contains a section of type 'rich-text' used as a CTA section

checklist.name: Rich-text button uses button_label (not button_label_1)
checklist.description: The button block inside the rich-text section uses 'button_label' as the field name — NOT 'button_label_1' (the _1 suffix variant)

checklist.name: Rich-text button uses button_link (not button_link_1)
checklist.description: The button block inside the rich-text section uses 'button_link' as the field name — NOT 'button_link_1' (the _1 suffix variant)

checklist.name: main-page section present
checklist.description: templates/page.how-it-works.json contains a section of type 'main-page'

checklist.name: Hero section present
checklist.description: templates/page.how-it-works.json contains a section of type 'image-banner' as the hero

checklist.name: CTA appears at end
checklist.description: The rich-text CTA section appears last (or near last) in the 'order' array — after the image-with-text panels

checklist.name: Valid JSON
checklist.description: templates/page.how-it-works.json is valid JSON that can be parsed without errors
